app.title: Show HN: Mindwalk – Replay coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase
app.author: cosmtrek
app.description: Replay and analyze 3D session of coding-agent
proposed_tests: Install the local client, create a simple example project
Run Mindwalk, check visualization rendering and interaction
Compare performance vs native rendering methods
Check accuracy of replayed session vs original
